seed_problem: Frontier-CS polyomino/area packing: pack polyominoes into a W x H board maximizing covered area (reflections allowed); checker validates no-overlap and in-bounds.
mutation: composite (goal + input): replace unweighted covered-area with a per-cell traffic-demand field so the objective becomes WEIGHTED coverage (a bounded knapsack over irregular shapes), add a demand grid to the input, and keep obstacles plus per-type bounded stock; optimal weighted packing over rotatable/reflectable polyominoes is NP-hard.
title: Traffic Signal Grid: Green-Wave Controller Placement
strategies: single-type baseline: anchored greedy using only template type 0 up to its stock (reproduces the checker calibration point)
area-first greedy: at each uncovered cell deploy the largest-cell template that fits, mixing all types, stock-limited (weight-blind)
demand-aware best-fit greedy: at each anchor pick the type/orientation covering the most traffic demand, steering large templates onto hotspots
seeded multi-restart demand-aware search: shuffle anchor order and type priority across restarts, keep the highest-demand feasible packing
